parameters.name: units
parameters.label: Cutoff Units
parameters.description: The filter cutoff frequency can be expressed in Hz (menu set to Frequency) or power-of-10 (menu set to Logarithmic). It enables one of the next 2 Filter Cutoff parameters.

parameters.name: cutofflog
parameters.label: Filter Cutoff (Hz=10**val)
parameters.description: The filter cutoff frequency expressed in power-of-10, where value 0 translates to 1 Hz (10**0), value 1 is 10 Hz (10**1), value 2 is 100 Hz (10**2), value 3 is 1000 Hz, value 4 is 10,000 Hz, value 4.5

parameters.name: cutofffrequency
parameters.label: Filter Cutoff (Hz)
parameters.description: The filter cutoff frequency expressed in Hz (cycles per second). This parameter set to 1000 has exactly the same effect as the above parameter set to 3.

parameters.name: resonance
parameters.label: Filter Resonance
parameters.description: Increasing the resonance will boost the loudness of the passed frequencies near the cutoff frequency.

parameters.name: rolloff
parameters.label: Roll-Off (dB per Octave)
parameters.description: Rolloff determines how much the levels decrease near the cutoff frequency. This parameter will make it decrease by 12 (dB) per octave, to, more extremely, 24 decibels per octave. 12 and 24 decibels co

parameters.name: drywet
parameters.label: Dry / Wet Mix
parameters.description: As this parameter is reduced from 1 (Wet) toward 0 (Dry), it removes the effect of the filter.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
